insufficient_credits.title: Insufficient Credits
insufficient_credits.description: You have {{available}} credit available, but you selected {{total}} contact. Upgrade your plan to send to all selected contacts.
insufficient_credits.description_plural: You have {{available}} credits available, but you selected {{total}} contacts. Upgrade your plan to send to all selected contacts.

consent_required.title: Consent Required
consent_required.description_one: {{available}} of {{total}} contact can receive email campaigns. You can only send to contacts who have opted in or have a legitimate interest basis.
consent_required.description: {{available}} of {{total}} contacts can receive email campaigns. You can only send to contacts who have opted in or have a legitimate interest basis.

partial_credits.title: Partial Credits Available
partial_credits.description_one: You can only send to {{available}} of {{total}} contact with your current credits. The remaining contacts will not receive this campaign.
partial_credits.description: You can only send to {{available}} of {{total}} contacts with your current credits. The remaining contacts will not receive this campaign.

no_consented_contacts.title: No Contacts Available
no_consented_contacts.description: None of your selected contacts have given consent to receive email campaigns. All {{total}} contact has opted out.
no_consented_contacts.description_plural: None of your selected contacts have given consent to receive email campaigns. All {{total}} contacts have opted out.
